hero.headline:
Autonomous & Independent
IP & Brand Owners.
hero.basedIn:
Based in Hong Kong.
Operating Worldwide.

entity.label: The Entity
entity.statement:
VORVN is not an agency.
It is the architecture
behind the brands.
entity.detail: Design is not decoration — it is the first decision. Every structure we build, every brand we deploy, starts from a single design question: does this create real value? VORVN is a private IP holdings company registered in Hong Kong, with participations across Southeast Asia, Northwest Africa, and Western consumer markets. We own, license, and deploy brand intellectual property across verticals — consumer goods, faith-driven gifting, modest fashion — without intermediaries, without compromise. Pure execution.
entity.designNote: Design · Strategy · Execution · No middlemen. No shortcuts.

portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.intro: The brands and intellectual property we design, build, and own — deployed across consumer markets worldwide.

v2.intro: Six brands. One holding. Every IP designed, owned, and operated in-house — from Hong Kong, Bali, and Marrakech. No licenses. No partners on the cap table. Just brands we built to last.

brands.name: Cook Warriors
brands.desc: A premium kitchenware brand built around the Eggscalibur — the iconic sword-handle frying pan. From concept through UAE fulfillment to US households, Cook Warriors is VORVN's flagship consumer goods brand.

brands.name: Hearts Notes
brands.pitch: Faith-centred gifting for the Christian home
brands.desc: A Christian gifting brand delivering faith-centred products through Etsy and direct-to-consumer channels. Workbooks, digital kits, and heartfelt gifts designed for the Christian home.

brands.name: MAQTOB
brands.desc: Premium Indonesian mukena prayer sets for the European Muslim market, launching with France. Modest fashion meets Balinese craftsmanship — a bridge between two worlds.

brands.name: xVoyager
brands.pitch: An exploration-first brand for global nomads
brands.desc: An exploration-first brand for global nomads and adventurers. Currently in concept development within the VORVN lab — designed for those who move without a fixed address.

brands.name: Warung Marrakech
brands.pitch: Where Morocco meets Bali · Spice & hospitality
brands.desc: A concept at the intersection of Moroccan heritage and Balinese hospitality. Spice, warmth, and culture — where two continents meet on one plate.

brands.name: Davi Properties
brands.desc: A real estate venture in development, leveraging VORVN's Southeast Asia network and operational infrastructure across the Indonesian archipelago.

brands.name: Cook Warriors
brands.desc: A premium kitchenware brand built around the Eggscalibur — the iconic sword-handle frying pan. From concept through UAE fulfillment to US households, Cook Warriors is VORVN's flagship consumer goods brand.

brands.name: MAQTOB
brands.desc: Premium Indonesian mukena prayer sets for the European Muslim market, launching with France. Modest fashion meets Balinese craftsmanship — a bridge between two worlds.

brands.name: xVoyager
brands.desc: An exploration-first brand for global nomads and adventurers. Currently in concept development within the VORVN lab — designed for those who move without a fixed address.

brands.name: Warung Marrakech
brands.desc: A concept at the intersection of Moroccan heritage and Balinese hospitality. Spice, warmth, and culture — where two continents meet on one plate.

items.title: Own the IP. Always.
items.body: No middlemen. No licensing dependency. Every brand we build, every asset we create — stays within the structure. Ownership is the non-negotiable premise.

items.title: Execute without friction.
items.body: Ideas without systems are noise. We structure, build, and deploy with operational precision — from concept to market, without compromise or delay.

items.title: Human first. AI amplified.
items.body: We got this early. AI doesn't replace the creative — it accelerates the builder. VORVN is built by humans, for humans, with intelligence as the sharpest tool.

founder.label: Founder
founder.quote:
"I believe the world belongs to those who design it, and that's exactly what we do.

We Design."
founder.name: Mehdi Ayache Berberos
founder.title: CEO & Founder — VORVN Limited

investors.label: Investor
investors.headline:
Kami tidak menggalang dana.
Kami memilih mitra.
investors.body: VORVN adalah perusahaan privat dan menguntungkan. Kami bekerja dengan dua jenis mitra — operator yang membangun bersama kami di Bali, dan investor yang ikut membangun usaha dari Hong Kong. Sisanya, kami kerjakan sendiri.
investors.incubatorDesc: Kami membawa brand dari konsep ke pasar di studio Bali kami. Desain, produksi, fulfillment — dalam satu atap.
investors.ventureDesc: Kami mendirikan usaha bersama mitra kapital. Cap table bersama, keyakinan bersama, horizon panjang.

footer.legal:
© 2025 VORVN LIMITED. All rights reserved.

notFound.label: Sinyal Hilang
notFound.headline: Halaman ini tidak ada dalam holding kami.
notFound.body: Rute yang Anda ikuti tidak sesuai dengan merek, entitas, atau dokumen mana pun di bawah VORVN. Mungkin telah dipindahkan — atau memang tidak pernah ada.

contact.label: Kontak
contact.headline:
Bicara langsung
dengan kami.
contact.body: Pengantar investor, kolaborasi merek, pers, karier — pilih topik dan tulis pesan yang nyata. Kami menjawab yang penting.
contact.privacy: Kami membalas dalam 48 jam. Tanpa newsletter. Tanpa spam.

fields.name: Nama lengkap
fields.messagePlaceholder: Ceritakan apa yang Anda bangun, mengapa sekarang, dan apa yang Anda butuhkan dari kami.
fields.topicHelp: Pilih yang paling sesuai — pesan Anda akan diarahkan ke orang yang tepat.

errors.name: Mohon masukkan nama lengkap (min. 2 karakter)
errors.email: Mohon masukkan alamat email yang valid

success.title: Pesan terkirim.
success.body: Terima kasih telah menghubungi. Kami membaca setiap pesan dan membalas dalam 48 jam — biasanya lebih cepat.
